mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_foot (user_id, document_id, document_type, document_user_id, collection_stat, read_stat, comment_stat, praise_stat, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{documentId}, #{documentType}, #{documentUserId}, #{collectionStat}, #{readStat}, #{commentStat}, #{praiseStat}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_foot SET collection_stat = #{collectionStat}, read_stat = #{readStat}, comment_stat = #{commentStat}, praise_stat = #{praiseStat}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
